title: repair a 2-error write-path + all-paths-return
statement: This program does not compile. Fix ALL defects (the compiler surfaces a second one after the first is resolved) so it compiles clean and `main` returns 15 (`Acc{total:10}` accumulated once by 5, with `twice = false`). Keep the observable result.

given_diagnostic.message: a write through a borrow needs an explicit `.*` dereference

notes.message: read access auto-derefs a borrow, but every deref on a write target must be written `.*` (design 0006 §2.4)
